//: Standard package.json scripts template for library packages
//usage: Libraries built with TypeScript compiler, using Vitest for testing

//notes.description: Use this template for standard TypeScript library packages

variants.tsup: For CLI/tool packages, replace 'tsc' with 'tsup' and 'tsc --watch' with 'tsup --watch'
variants.vite: For UI component libraries, use 'vite build' instead of 'tsc'

optional_scripts: test:ui - only if package has significant test suite
format - only if package is actively developed
